name: RoPE
description: Rotary Positional Encoding - applies rotation to Q/K based on position
code:
# RoPE frequency computation
_rope{{_id}}_dim = {{head_dim}}
_rope{{_id}}_freqs = 1.0 / ({{theta}} ** (np.arange(0, _rope{{_id}}_dim, 2, dtype=np.float32) / _rope{{_id}}_dim))
_rope{{_id}}_seq_len = {{q}}.shape[-2]
_rope{{_id}}_pos = np.arange(_rope{{_id}}_seq_len, dtype=np.float32)
_rope{{_id}}_angles = np.outer(_rope{{_id}}_pos, _rope{{_id}}_freqs)
_rope{{_id}}_cos = np.cos(_rope{{_id}}_angles).astype(np.float32)
_rope{{_id}}_sin = np.sin(_rope{{_id}}_angles).astype(np.float32)
# Apply rotation to Q
_rope{{_id}}_q1 = {{q}}[..., 0::2]
_rope{{_id}}_q2 = {{q}}[..., 1::2]
{{q_rotated}} = np.zeros_like({{q}})
{{q_rotated}}[..., 0::2] = _rope{{_id}}_q1 * _rope{{_id}}_cos - _rope{{_id}}_q2 * _rope{{_id}}_sin
{{q_rotated}}[..., 1::2] = _rope{{_id}}_q1 * _rope{{_id}}_sin + _rope{{_id}}_q2 * _rope{{_id}}_cos
# Apply rotation to K
_rope{{_id}}_k1 = {{k}}[..., 0::2]
_rope{{_id}}_k2 = {{k}}[..., 1::2]
{{k_rotated}} = np.zeros_like({{k}})
{{k_rotated}}[..., 0::2] = _rope{{_id}}_k1 * _rope{{_id}}_cos - _rope{{_id}}_k2 * _rope{{_id}}_sin
{{k_rotated}}[..., 1::2] = _rope{{_id}}_k1 * _rope{{_id}}_sin + _rope{{_id}}_k2 * _rope{{_id}}_cos
